name: University of Bath
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year BSc with mandatory 12-month industrial placement; Chemistry and Biology required; consistently one of the UK's best biochemistry placement programmes with AstraZeneca, Pfizer and GSK as partner employers

name: University of Manchester
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MBiochem with optional placement year in biopharmaceutical or biotech company; Chemistry and Biology required; strong pharma industry links in Manchester

name: University of Nottingham
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year BSc/MBiochem with Year 3 industry placement; Chemistry required; partners include AbbVie, Novartis and Almac; Nottingham's pharma corridor locations

name: University of Leeds
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MBiochem with 12-month placement year; placement in biotech, pharma or NHS diagnostics; Chemistry required; strong industry placement support service

name: University of Warwick
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MBiochem with optional research year abroad or industrial placement; Chemistry and Biology required; links to AstraZeneca and Merck through the Warwick Science Campus

name: University of York
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MBiochem with industrial placement year; Chemistry and Biology required; York Science Park proximity enables frequent industry partnerships for placements

name: University of Southampton
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MBiochem with industry year in pharmaceutical or biotechnology company; Chemistry required; linked to Southampton's biomedical research cluster and Discovery Science Park

name: University of Sheffield
notes: Verified UCAS 2026 exact title match; 4-year MBiochem with optional industrial placement year; Chemistry required; industry partners include AstraZeneca, UCB and local Sheffield biotech SMEs

name: University of Surrey
